title: H2-Surgical 1.0 per-hand command
description: One compiled command for one hand at one command tick: a Cartesian fingertip-frame target plus 20 per-finger joint targets plus the grasp and tool state. Emitted by src/autonomy/plan_compiler.py from LLM phase-level intents.

tip_target.description: commanded hand reference tip x y z mm in patient frame

tip_orientation.description: commanded orientation quaternion qx qy qz qw

finger_target.description: 20 per-finger joint targets radians, 5 fingers x 4 joints

velocity_scale.description: safety-gated velocity scale applied by the vessel and collision gates

force_soft_cap_n.description: per-fingertip soft force cap applied this tick

intent_id.description: identifier of the LLM intent this command was compiled from
